name: Cavatiney
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil a half bag of medium noodles.
2. Brown one pound hamburger and one pound sausage.
3. Drain the noodles and mix them in a bowl with the hamburger, sausage, pizza sauce, and spaghetti sauce.
4. Grease a baking dish with butter (only a thin coat).
5. Spoon the meat mixture into the baking dish.
6. Top with pepperoni, mozzarella cheese, and sharp cheddar cheese.
7. Sprinkle lightly with garlic powder.
8. Place in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake until the cheese melts.
9. Enjoy your Cavatiney! Let me know how you like it. I have plenty of other recipes to share with everyone.
